formulas.latex: B_{i t_{1} t_{2}}^{'} = A \cap \left[\left\{\sigma_{i}^{t_{1}} \rightarrow \rho_{i + 1 , l}^{t^{'}} \mid l = 1 , 2 , \ldots , m_{i + 1} ; t_{2} < t^{'} \leq T\right\} \cup \left\{\sigma_{i}^{t_{1}} \rightarrow \varphi_{i + 1}^{t^{'}} \mid m_{i + 1}^{'} = 1 ; t_{2} < t^{'} \leq T\right\} \cup \left\{\varphi_{i}^{t_{1}} \rightarrow \rho_{i + 1 , l}^{t^{'}} \mid m_{i}^{'} = 1 ; l = 1 , 2 , \ldots , m_{i + 1} ; t_{2} < t^{'} \leq T\right\} \cup \left\{\varphi_{i}^{t_{1}} \rightarrow \varphi_{i + 1}^{t^{'}} \mid m_{i}^{'} = m_{i + 1}^{'} = 1 ; t_{2} < t^{'} \leq T\right\}\right] .

formulas.latex: \overset{̃}{\mathbf{P}}_{k}^{'} \left(\lambda , \mu\right) : \text{Minimize} \underset{u \rightarrow v \in A}{\sum} \xi^{k} \left(u , v\right) x_{u v}^{k} + \underset{C \in \mathcal{C}}{\sum} \lambda_{C} \underset{u \rightarrow v \in C}{\sum} x_{u v}^{k} - \underset{u \rightarrow v \in A_{d e p} \cup A_{t r v}}{\sum} \mu_{u v} \Gamma_{k} x_{u v}^{k} \text{subject}\textrm{ }\text{to}\textrm{ }\textrm{ } \underset{\left\{v : \overset{̄}{o} \rightarrow v \in A\right\}}{\sum} x_{\overset{̄}{o} v}^{k} = 1 , \underset{\left\{u : u \rightarrow \overset{̄}{d} \in A\right\}}{\sum} x_{u \overset{̄}{d}}^{k} = 1 , \underset{\left\{u : u \rightarrow v \in A\right\}}{\sum} x_{u v}^{k} = \underset{\left\{w : v \rightarrow w \in A\right\}}{\sum} x_{v w}^{k} , \text{for}\textrm{ }\text{all}\textrm{ } v \in V \backslash \left\{\overset{̄}{o} , \overset{̄}{d}\right\} x_{u v}^{k} \in \left\{0 , 1\right\} , \text{for}\textrm{ }\text{all}\textrm{ } u \rightarrow v \in A

                                          <mml:mn>1</mml:mn>
                                          <mml:mo>−</mml:mo>
                                          <mml:mfrac>
                                             <mml:mrow>
                                                <mml:mtext>number of unsatisfied passengers</mml:mtext>
                                             </mml:mrow>
                                             <mml:mrow>
                                                <mml:mtext>total number of passengers</mml:mtext>
                                             </mml:mrow>
                                          </mml:mfrac>
                                       </mml:mrow>
                                       <mml:mo class="biggr" fence="true">)</mml:mo>
                                    </mml:mrow>
                                    <mml:mo linebreak="goodbreak">×</mml:mo>
                                    <mml:mn>100</mml:mn>
                                    <mml:mtext>%</mml:mtext>
                                    <mml:mo>.</mml:mo>
                                 </mml:mrow>
                              </mml:math>
